description: Verify personal/project knowledge spaces, folder inheritance, explicit sharing, snapshot scope resolution, and access logging.

command: set -euo pipefail; tmp=$(mktemp -d); trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT; cp -a agent-system "$tmp/agent-system"; cp -a scripts "$tmp/scripts"; export DIGITAL_OFFICE_SYSTEM_HOME="$tmp/agent-system"; office="$tmp/agent-system/bin/office-system"; "$office" knowledge-folder-create --space-type personal --owner alice --folder-id private --title Private --created-by alice --role member > "$tmp/folder.json"; "$office" knowledge-item-add --space-type personal --owner alice --folder-id private --item-id item-1 --title Secret --source-ref local://secret.md --created-by alice --role member > "$tmp/item.json"; set +e; "$office" knowledge-access-check --space-type personal --owner alice --resource-type item --resource-id item-1 --user bob --role member > "$tmp/deny.json" 2> "$tmp/deny.err"; code=$?; set -e; test "$code" -ne 0; "$office" knowledge-share --space-type personal --owner alice --resource-type folder --resource-id private --target-type user --target-id bob --shared-by alice --role member > "$tmp/share-user.json"; "$office" knowledge-access-check --space-type personal --owner alice --resource-type item --resource-id item-1 --user bob --role member > "$tmp/allow-user.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data["decision"]["allowed"] is True' "$tmp/allow-user.json"; set +e; "$office" knowledge-access-check --space-type personal --owner alice --resource-type item --resource-id item-1 --user worker --role member --agent coder > "$tmp/agent-deny.json" 2> "$tmp/agent-deny.err"; code=$?; set -e; test "$code" -ne 0; "$office" knowledge-share --space-type personal --owner alice --resource-type item --resource-id item-1 --target-type agent --target-id coder --shared-by alice --role member > "$tmp/share-agent.json"; "$office" knowledge-access-check --space-type personal --owner alice --resource-type item --resource-id item-1 --user worker --role member --agent coder > "$tmp/agent-allow.json"; "$office" knowledge-scope-resolve --space-type personal --owner alice --folder-id private --user bob --role member > "$tmp/scope.json"; python3 -c 'import json,sys; data=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); assert data["snapshot"]["mode"] == "snapshot" and data["snapshot"]["item_ids"] == ["item-1"]' "$tmp/scope.json"; grep -q knowledge_acl_access "$tmp/agent-system/logs/knowledge-access.jsonl"
